title: archiphyllum oblongifolium
intro: Archiphyllum oblongifolium, also known as the Japanese angelica tree or the Japanese angelica, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Archiphyllum oblongifolium include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce the risk of certain diseases such as cancer and cardiovascular disease. Herbal preparations of Archiphyllum oblongifolium include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
